visit_detail_id.visit_detail_parent_id, visit_detail_id: Hierarchy: visit_detail_parent_id can be a parent of visit_detail_id

person_id.person_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Identifier for the person associated with the visit

visit_detail_concept_id.visit_detail_concept_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Concept identifier for the type of visit detail

visit_detail_start_date.visit_detail_start_date: Type: Date; Meaning: Start date of the visit detail
visit_detail_start_date.visit_detail_start_date, visit_detail_st: Correlation: visit_detail_start_date is the date part of visit_detail_start_datetime

visit_detail_start_datetime.visit_detail_start_datetime: Type: DateTime; Meaning: Start datetime of the visit detail
visit_detail_start_datetime.visit_detail_start_date, visit_detail_st: Correlation: visit_detail_start_date is the date part of visit_detail_start_datetime

visit_detail_end_date.visit_detail_end_date: Type: Date; Meaning: End date of the visit detail
visit_detail_end_date.visit_detail_end_date, visit_detail_end_: Correlation: visit_detail_end_date is the date part of visit_detail_end_datetime

visit_detail_end_datetime.visit_detail_end_datetime: Type: DateTime; Meaning: End datetime of the visit detail
visit_detail_end_datetime.visit_detail_end_date, visit_detail_end_: Correlation: visit_detail_end_date is the date part of visit_detail_end_datetime

visit_detail_type_concept_id.visit_detail_type_concept_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Concept identifier for the type of visit detail

provider_id.provider_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Identifier for the provider who conducted the visit

care_site_id.care_site_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Identifier for the care site where the visit took place

visit_detail_source_value.visit_detail_source_value: Type: String; Meaning: Source value for the visit detail

visit_detail_source_concept_id.visit_detail_source_concept_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Concept identifier for the source value of the visit detail

admitted_from_source_value.admitted_from_source_value: Type: String; Meaning: Source value for the admission source

admitted_from_concept_id.admitted_from_concept_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Concept identifier for the admission source

discharge_to_source_value.discharge_to_source_value: Type: String; Meaning: Source value for the discharge destination

discharge_to_concept_id.discharge_to_concept_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Concept identifier for the discharge destination

preceding_visit_detail_id.preceding_visit_detail_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Identifier for the preceding visit detail
preceding_visit_detail_id.preceding_visit_detail_id, visit_detail_: Hierarchy: preceding_visit_detail_id can be a parent of visit_detail_id

visit_detail_parent_id.visit_detail_parent_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Identifier for the parent visit detail
visit_detail_parent_id.visit_detail_parent_id, visit_detail_id: Hierarchy: visit_detail_parent_id can be a parent of visit_detail_id

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Identifier for the visit occurrence

person_id.person_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Unique identifier for a person

gender_concept_id.gender_concept_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Standardized concept ID for gender

year_of_birth.year_of_birth: Type: Integer; Meaning: Year of birth of the person
year_of_birth.year_of_birth, month_of_birth, day_of_bi: Hierarchy: year_of_birth, month_of_birth, day_of_birth form a date hierarchy

month_of_birth.month_of_birth: Type: Integer; Meaning: Month of birth of the person
month_of_birth.year_of_birth, month_of_birth, day_of_bi: Hierarchy: year_of_birth, month_of_birth, day_of_birth form a date hierarchy

day_of_birth.day_of_birth: Type: Integer; Meaning: Day of birth of the person
day_of_birth.year_of_birth, month_of_birth, day_of_bi: Hierarchy: year_of_birth, month_of_birth, day_of_birth form a date hierarchy

birth_datetime.birth_datetime: Type: DateTime; Meaning: Full date and time of birth of the person

death_datetime.death_datetime: Type: DateTime; Meaning: Full date and time of death of the person

race_concept_id.race_concept_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Standardized concept ID for race

ethnicity_concept_id.ethnicity_concept_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Standardized concept ID for ethnicity

location_id.location_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Identifier for the person's location

provider_id.provider_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Identifier for the person's provider

care_site_id.care_site_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Identifier for the person's care site

person_source_value.person_source_value: Type: String; Meaning: Source value for the person identifier

gender_source_value.gender_source_value: Type: String; Meaning: Source value for the gender

race_source_value.race_source_value: Type: String; Meaning: Source value for the race

race_source_concept_id.race_source_concept_id: Type: Integer; Meaning: Standardized concept ID for the source race value

ethnicity_source_value.ethnicity_source_value: Type: String; Meaning: Source value for the ethnicity
